name: Standing Reach Up Back Rotation Stretch
shortDescription: A dynamic stretch involving reaching overhead and rotating to open up the chest and upper back.
instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Reach both arms overhead and gently arch your upper back while rotating your torso to one side, focusing on stretching through your chest and shoulders. Hold for a moment, return to center, and repeat to the other side.
steps: Stand tall with feet shoulder-width apart.
Gently arch your upper back and chest.
Rotate your torso to one side while maintaining the stretch.
Return to center, then rotate to the other side.
breathing: Inhale before reaching up; exhale as you rotate and stretch.
